title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.130 - List of the officers elected
text:
65.130.  List of the officers elected. — The township clerks shall transmit to the county clerk, to be filed in his office, a list of the names of the township officers so elected, within five days after such election shall have been held.
(RSMo 1939 § 13950) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12273; 1919 § 13186; 1909 § 11674
